sprint: Auth Provider Switching — Phase 5: End-to-End Validation

agent_communication.protocol: CHECK YOUR INBOX FILE FIRST at the start of every cycle, before reading this TASK_BOARD. The Manager will leave direct messages there when immediate responses are needed. Reply by appending a REPLY block in your inbox file, or by acting and logging in QA_REPORT.md / BUILD_LOG.md.

manager_assessment.overall_status: 🟢 ACTIVE — All strategic decisions locked. Inbox system now live. Observer has an open message in OBSERVER_INBOX.md — check it immediately. Operator clear to continue T-005, T-007, T-010 code work.

owner_decisions_locked.Q1_authentik_first_login: AUTO-CREATE org on first Authentik login. First user in new org gets role=admin.
owner_decisions_locked.Q2_long_term_auth_strategy: KEEP BOTH PROVIDERS PERMANENTLY. Clerk must not be removed, degraded, or affected in any way.
owner_decisions_locked.Q3_switcher_access_control: ADMIN ONLY. T-007 + T-010 must ship together.

architecture_notes_for_agents: Middleware runs on Edge runtime — provider-constant.ts is the ONLY safe import for middleware.
getActiveProvider() has a 5s cache TTL. Tests switching provider must wait >5s before asserting.
next-auth requires trustHost: true behind Traefik — do not remove.
Clerk clerkMiddleware() MUST run on all requests even when Authentik is active — Clerk is permanent.
The /api/auth/authentik-signin route calls authentikSignIn() server-side. The old /api/auth/signin/authentik is broken.
Coolify SaaS app UUID: tuk1rcjj16vlk33jrbx3c9d3. MCP server UUID: a1fr37jiwehxbfqp90k4cvsw.
Both providers are permanent — any code touching Clerk must treat it as a first-class citizen, not legacy.

in_progress.title: [INFRA] Restore BUILD_LOG.md
in_progress.manager_instruction: Active. Read /api/version, check Coolify app UUID tuk1rcjj16vlk33jrbx3c9d3 for deployment timestamp + log errors, confirm migrations ran. Write to /agent_sync/BUILD_LOG.md. Include post-incident note: disk usage and container count after Docker prune.

in_progress.title: [INFRA] Schedule recurring Docker prune on Hetzner
in_progress.manager_instruction: Active. Check if Coolify has a built-in prune schedule. If not, add a weekly cron on the Hetzner host: 'docker system prune -f --filter until=24h'. Consider also truncating /var/log on a schedule. Document in BUILD_LOG.md.

in_progress.title: [VERIFY] Authentik sign-in flow end-to-end — build 670473e
in_progress.manager_instruction: ⚠️ CHECK OBSERVER_INBOX.md FIRST. Then run full test matrix A → E. Log every step in QA_REPORT.md. Precondition: confirm /api/version returns 670473e or its ci: child. If wrong, log BLOCKED.

test_matrix.precondition: Confirm /api/version returns SHA matching 670473e or its ci: child. If wrong, STOP and log BLOCKED.

test_A_clerk_baseline.name: A — Clerk baseline (regression)
steps: Ensure app_config.auth_provider = clerk
Navigate to /sign-in → Clerk modal loads
Sign in with test Clerk account
Assert: /dashboard loads, org name visible, no console errors
Assert: billing status loads
Assert: Coolify logs clean

test_B_switch_to_authentik.name: B — Switch Clerk → Authentik
steps: From /dashboard/admin/auth-provider, select Authentik → Switch
Assert: POST /api/admin/auth-provider returns 200
Assert: Auto sign-out from Clerk fires
Assert: Redirect goes to /api/auth/authentik-signin (NOT old v4 route)
Assert: Browser lands on https://auth.joefuentes.me
Sign in with Authentik test credentials
Assert: Redirect returns to https://cuttingedgechat.com/dashboard
Assert: next-auth DB session row created in sessions table
Wait 6s, assert getActiveProvider() = 'authentik'
Assert: No UntrustedHost or redirect_uri_mismatch in Coolify logs

test_C_authentik_session.name: C — Dashboard integrity under Authentik session
steps: Signed in via Authentik, navigate to /dashboard
Assert: org context loads (may be absent until T-005 ships — log as known gap, not failure)
Assert: billing status loads — no 401 or 500
Assert: Stripe checkout initiates without auth errors
Assert: Coolify logs clean

test_D_switch_back_to_clerk.name: D — Switch Authentik → Clerk
steps: From /dashboard/admin/auth-provider, switch back to Clerk
Assert: next-auth sign-out fires correctly
Assert: Redirect goes to /sign-in (Clerk), NOT auth.joefuentes.me
Sign in via Clerk
Assert: /dashboard loads normally, no stale next-auth cookie interference
Assert: Clerk session fully intact

test_E_smoke_badge.name: E — Smoke badge
steps: Check https://mcp.joefuentes.me/badge/smoke
Assert: badge shows passing for 670473e or ci: child
Assert: smoke-status.json not overwritten by stale run

in_progress.on_failure: Move T-001 to blocked. Log exact step, error, HTTP status, Coolify log excerpt in QA_REPORT.md.

in_progress.title: First Authentik login auto-creates user + org in DB
in_progress.manager_instruction: Code now, deploy after T-001 passes. In src/libs/auth-nextauth.ts signIn callback: (1) check organization_member for existing org, (2) if none, create organization row (name from email local-part or display name, URL-safe slug), (3) insert organization_member with role='admin'. Additive only — must not touch Clerk flows. Wrap in try/catch. T-008 can be added to this same callback (populate authentikId from profile.sub if null).

in_progress.title: Restrict auth provider switcher to org admin role only
in_progress.manager_instruction: Code now, deploy with T-010. In POST /api/admin/auth-provider: under Clerk use clerkClient to assert role=admin; under Authentik query organization_member. Return 403 if not admin. DO NOT SHIP without T-010 — risk of locking out all users if no admin exists yet.

backlog.title: Guarantee at least one admin user exists — bootstrap + enforcement
backlog.manager_instruction: Must ship alongside T-007. Part 1 (BOOTSTRAP): first user in T-005 org creation gets role=admin — already covered in T-005 instruction. Part 2 (ENFORCEMENT): any API that demotes or removes a member must first count remaining admins in that org. If count would reach zero, return 400 with message 'Cannot remove the last admin of an organization.' Observer must test this: attempt to demote the only admin and assert 400.

backlog.title: Populate user.authentikId after first Authentik login
backlog.manager_instruction: Fold into T-005 signIn callback. After user row found/created, if user.authentikId is null populate from profile.sub. Deploy together with T-005.

backlog.title: Stripe checkout works under Authentik session
backlog.manager_instruction: HOLD — depends on T-005 (org must exist for Stripe org lookup). Queue after T-005 deploys.

backlog.title: Sign-out from Authentik redirects correctly on provider switch-back
backlog.manager_instruction: HOLD — covered by T-001 Test D. Closes with T-001 or escalates as separate blocker.

in_review.title: Smoke test polls correct SHA (parent of CI bump)
in_review.manager_instruction: Queue after T-001 complete. Push trivial commit, confirm smoke-test.yml polls parent SHA not ci: bump. Log both SHAs in QA_REPORT.md.

in_review.title: Smoke test concurrency — cancel stale runs + run_id guard
in_review.manager_instruction: Queue LAST — highest server load. Trigger two simultaneous smoke runs, assert older cancelled, smoke-status.json reflects newer result.

done.title: Auth provider instant switching via DB (no redeploy)
done.closed_note: getActiveProvider() reads app_config table, 5s cache, env var fallback. setActiveProvider() writes DB + busts cache. Middleware checks both Clerk and next-auth cookies. Edge-safe via provider-constant.ts.

active_priority_order: 3. OBSERVER: T-001 A-E — log everything in QA_REPORT.md
4. OPERATOR: T-005 + T-008 code (deploy after T-001 passes)
7. OBSERVER: T-006 / T-009 after T-005 deployed
8. OBSERVER: T-010 QA — test last-admin demotion guard
9. OBSERVER: T-003 chaos test — absolute last
